'''gaworo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyrbasia|kyrbasia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyrbasia|kyrbasia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gaworo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæwereth|gæwereth]] || [[word:gæwerej|gæwerej]] || [[word:gæweresh|gæweresh]] || [[word:gæwere|gæwere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawoworoth|gawoworoth]] || [[word:gawoworoj|gawoworoj]] || [[word:gawoworosh|gawoworosh]] || [[word:gawoworo|gawoworo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gaworoth|gaworoth]] || [[word:gaworoj|gaworoj]] || [[word:gaworosh|gaworosh]] || [[word:gaworo|gaworo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawofroth|gawofroth]] || [[word:gawofroj|gawofroj]] || [[word:gawofrosh|gawofrosh]] || [[word:gawofrof|gawofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gaworotho|gaworotho]] || [[word:gaworojo|gaworojo]] || [[word:gaworosho|gaworosho]] || [[word:gaworoko|gaworoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gaworoth|gaworoth]] || [[word:gaworoj|gaworoj]] || [[word:gaworosh|gaworosh]] || [[word:gaworo|gaworo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gaworothol|gaworothol]] || [[word:gaworojol|gaworojol]] || [[word:gaworoshol|gaworoshol]] || [[word:gaworokol|gaworokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gaworothotho|gaworothotho]] || [[word:gaworojojo|gaworojojo]] || [[word:gaworoshosho|gaworoshosho]] || [[word:gaworoko|gaworoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gaworothon|gaworothon]] || [[word:gaworojon|gaworojon]] || [[word:gaworoshon|gaworoshon]] || [[word:gaworokon|gaworokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gaworothoro|gaworothoro]] || [[word:gaworojoro|gaworojoro]] || [[word:gaworoshoro|gaworoshoro]] || [[word:gaworokoro|gaworokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
